title: Web Data, Fetch, Storage, and Security Boundaries · Language Lens: Url Formdata
summary: Load and cache public service data while handling hostile input, offline states, privacy, and response failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js url formdata increment in a resilient privacy-aware service-data client. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Construct and parse URL, URLSearchParams, FormData, and encoded payloads without manual delimiter bugs.
Use fetch with explicit method, headers, body, status checks, parsing, abort, and failure-state behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
